text:
If there are stomach problems or diarrhea, it will be necessary to find a replacement food because it is a useful source of calories and calcium. There are supplemental foods that are flavored, nutritionally balanced liquids. They are better tolerated.

In Crohn’s disease your doctor may also use a continuous tube-feeding method: the food is delivered through a small tube that passes through the nose into the stomach. This can be done at home without stopping school after a hospital stay to learn. This treatment (enteral nutrition) helps control disease flares and supports growth.
